[Document: Case#6574024-Configuration document Audit OB pallet SDN-215]

1.Go to facilities UI: 2.Click Apply 3.select and click edit 4. Click warehouse details 5.Click outbound tab and choose Quality audit logging as” Record all oLPN details ” 6. Click save at bottom
